title: cissus rafflesiae
intro: Cissus rafflesiae, also known as the coral vine or coral root, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cissus rafflesiae include its ability to reduce joint pain and inflammation, improve bone health, and support immune function. Cissus rafflesiae is typically prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, with some traditional preparations involving the use of the plant's root or leaves.
